title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for interacting with the Ollama server; chat, generate embeddings, pull/list models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers (via proxy).

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package adding Ollama chat, embeddings and tool-calling support.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI); supports RAG, multimodal, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem for Ollama; supports chat, generate, pull and list operations.

title: ollama-cli (npm)
summary: Lightweight Node CLI wrapper around ollama-js for quick prompts and model management.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension bringing local LLM code completion via Ollama; supports GhostText protocol.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models to Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community extension embedding Ollama models as Camunda external task workers for BPMN AI tasks.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & GPU) published to Docker Hub with multi-arch support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix package derivation for Ollama enabling reproducible installs on NixOS and macOS.

title: ollama-model-librarian
summary: Community tool that scans Hugging Face and auto-converts compatible GGUF models into Ollama Modelfiles.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Open-source Discord bot that brings local LLM conversations to any server using Ollama.

title: ollama-experiments
summary: Community repo benchmarking quantization speed vs quality across different Ollama model variants.

title: ollama-rag-panel
summary: Experimental Streamlit dashboard for building RAG pipelines with Ollama embeddings and Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-llamafile-bridge
summary: Mozilla experiment exposing llamafile binaries through Ollama’s OpenAI-compatible endpoint for portable LLM runs.

title: ollama-model-zoo
summary: Curated collection of community-submitted Modelfiles for fine-tuned and niche models ready to pull.
